title: Explicit promise creates a commitment
syntheticDataDisclosure: Synthetic fixture only; invented prose and records, with no real user or SECRET payload.

acceptedSegment.text: Kell met Osa's gaze. "I will bring your brother back before sunrise," he said, and offered his signet as surety. Osa accepted it.

evidenceSpans.text: Kell met Osa's gaze. "I will bring your brother back before sunrise," he said, and offered his signet as surety. Osa accepted it.

findings.summary: Kell made and secured a promise to return Osa's brother before sunrise.
findings.uncertaintyOrRivalReading: Success remains uncertain, but the promise and accepted surety are explicit.

coverage.reason: Osa now physically holds Kell's signet as surety.
The promise creates a before-sunrise deadline.
No separate knowledge or secret change is established.
Kell makes an explicit promise accepted by Osa.
The accepted surety changes the practical trust relation, though its emotional meaning needs judgment.
Kell is committed to the search and Osa holds his signet.

prohibitedInventions: Do not claim Kell knows where the brother is.
Do not claim the promise has already been fulfilled.
